name: change-your-questions-change-your-life
description: Marilee Adams's Change Your Questions, Change Your Life — apply the Choice Map and Question Thinking framework to shift from Judger to Learner mindset by changing the questions you ask yourself
useCase: Helps leaders, coaches, and individuals transform how they think by recognizing when they're in Judger mindset and using switching questions to shift to Learner mindset — improving communication, decision-making, and relationships.
knownRisks: Question Thinking is a skill that requires consistent practice — knowing the framework isn't enough
